# Workspace Trust & Environments

Each session carries its own trust level — a folder you haven't decided on opens Restricted, shown by the clickable {trust} element that now leads the status bar. Fresh detects the project's environment (venv / direnv / mise) and offers a single combined trust-and-activate prompt; once trusted, the env activates and the language servers and tools Fresh spawns inherit it.
